vehicle: Starship (Super Heavy + Starship + on-orbit refilling tanker fleet)
payload: Crew of ~10 + ISRU equipment + return propellant production hardware
delta_v: ~21 km/s (round trip with Mars surface refuelling)
credit: © SpaceX — Long-term crewed Mars architecture per Elon Musk's IAC presentations (2016 / 2017 / 2024) and SpaceX Mars program statements. Round-trip enabled by ISRU propellant production on the Mars surface (CH₄ + LOX from CO₂ + H₂O). Date is illustrative — the 2031 Mars launch window is one of several long-term targets discussed by SpaceX; actual schedule depends on Starship maturation, prior cargo missions, and ISRU validation. Round-trip arc is the conceptual architecture, not a flight plan.
